strengths: 20+ years of multi-domain systems engineering exceeds requirement; provides architectural breadth for platform strategy advising
Currently hands-on with cutting-edge AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic frameworks at re:cinq)—directly aligned with AI strategy focus, demonstrating builder fluency
10-year founder of GISCollective (adopted by Green Map); teaching and open-source track record show entrepreneurial thinking and ability to inspire
concerns: AI specialization is recent (April 2025 start); lacks prior AI/ML projects and formal AI/ML degree
No platform-scale strategy experience or tenure at cloud platform providers (AWS/Azure/GCP); has cloud infrastructure project experience only
Limited industry conference presence; primary talk is 2019 FOSS4G on GIS (not AI/cloud strategy focused)

key_factors.factor: Currently hands-on with cutting-edge AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic frameworks)
20+ years of multi-domain systems engineering career exceeds requirement
AI specialization recent (April 2025 start) with no formal AI/ML education

response.justification: Bogdan brings 20+ years of multi-domain systems engineering (exceeding the 15-year requirement) and is currently hands-on with cutting-edge AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic frameworks at re:cinq)—directly aligned with the AI strategy focus. His 10-year founder tenure (GISCollective, adopted by Green Map) and teaching track record demonstrate entrepreneurial capability and ability to inspire teams. While AI specialization is recent (April 2025 start) and formal AI education is absent, this is offset by current builder fluency with AI infrastructure and broad technical foundation supporting rapid depth in AI strategy.
